items.briefing:
Security researchers have identified a malware campaign targeting Mac users through fake Claude AI chat applications — Australians using AI tools should only download software from official, verified sources. Separately, the Inc ransomware group is actively exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in SonicWall SMA devices; organisations using these products should apply security updates immediately.

A new survey highlights that many Australians are turning to AI tools for financial advice, which raises concerns about the accuracy and safety of that guidance. If you use AI for sensitive decisions, always verify the advice with a qualified professional.

**Tip:** Before downloading any AI app, check the developer's official website to confirm it's legitimate.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities.
